name: A Corpus of Persuasion Techniques in Slavic Languages
summary: arXiv:2607.10715v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Persuasion techniques are powerful rhetorical devices used to sway public opinion in a wide range of media. We present a new corpus of persuasion t...
description: arXiv:2607.10715v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Persuasion techniques are powerful rhetorical devices used to sway public opinion in a wide range of media. We present a new corpus of persuasion techniques, focusing on Slavic languages. The corpus contains documents in Bulgarian, Polish, and Russian, annotated with persuasion techniques at the coarse-grained text-span level and fine-grained se...
author: Jakub Piskorski, Dimitar Iliyanov Dimitrov, Marina Ernst, Jacek Haneczok, Micha{\l} Marci\'nczuk, Arkadiusz Modzelewski, Roman Yangarber
